source.request: Build a weather dashboard that shows current conditions and a 5-day forecast for a user-selected location. Should support both desktop and mobile, and work in light and dark mode.

intent.goal: Provide users with a clear, at-a-glance view of current weather conditions and a 5-day forecast for any location they choose, accessible on both desktop and mobile devices.

personas.name: Casual User
personas.needs: Quickly check today's weather and the next few days before planning outdoor activities. Wants a clean, simple interface without information overload.

personas.name: Power User
personas.needs: Monitor detailed weather metrics (humidity, wind speed, UV index, pressure) across multiple saved locations. Prefers dense information layout with trend data.

success_criteria: User can search for and select a location within 3 interactions
Current conditions and 5-day forecast are visible above the fold on desktop (1280px wide)
All core functionality is operable via keyboard alone with visible focus indicators

constraints.brand: Internal design system; use mock-internal-ui token palette

non_goals: Radar or satellite map views are out of scope for v1
Push notifications and alerts are deferred to a future iteration

screens.name: Main Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display current conditions, hourly snapshot, and 5-day forecast for the active location

screens.name: Location Search
screens.purpose: Allow users to search for and select a new location by city name or ZIP code

navigation.trigger: User clicks the location bar search icon or current location name
User selects a result from the search list or presses Escape to cancel

flows.name: Change Location
steps: User types city name or ZIP
Dashboard refreshes with new location data

flows.name: First Load
steps: App loads with empty state (no saved location)
Location search screen is shown immediately
User searches and selects a location
Dashboard displays weather data for selected location

regions.name: header
regions.responsive: Full width; collapses to icon-only nav on mobile (< 640px)

regions.name: location-bar
regions.responsive: Full width sticky bar below header; shows city name and search icon

regions.name: current-conditions
regions.responsive: Hero region; 2-column on desktop (icon + stats), stacked on mobile

regions.name: forecast-strip
regions.responsive: Horizontal scrolling row of 5 day cards; full width

regions.name: detail-cards
regions.responsive: 3-column grid on desktop (lg+), 2-column on tablet (md), 1-column on mobile

regions.name: search-input
regions.responsive: Full width with prominent input; auto-focused on mount

regions.name: results-list
regions.responsive: Full width scrollable list; max-height 60vh with overflow-y:auto

component_bindings.need: Overall page shell with top navigation and theme support
Current temperature display with feels-like stat
Wind speed metric with trend indicator
Container for each forecast day card in the strip
Container for detail metric cards grid
Search input for city name or ZIP code
Each location result row in the list
Confirm selection of a location from results

transitions: On location change: fade out current data, show skeleton loaders, fade in new data on success
On error: replace content area with inline error message and retry button
Forecast strip: horizontal scroll on mobile; arrow key navigation on desktop

validation: Input must be at least 2 characters before triggering search
Show inline error if API returns no results for the query
transitions: Slide-in overlay from top on open; slide-out on close/cancel
Results list fades in after 300ms debounce from last keystroke
Selecting a result immediately navigates back to dashboard with skeleton state

accessibility.keyboard_model: Tab to all interactive elements; Enter/Space activate buttons; Escape closes location search overlay; Arrow keys navigate forecast strip; results list uses roving tabindex
focus_order: Current conditions (read-only stats, no tab stop)
Forecast strip (first card focused, arrow keys move between cards)

prototype.run_cmd: cd prototype && pnpm install && pnpm dev

elicitation_log.question: Should the dashboard default to the user's geolocation on first load, or require explicit search?
elicitation_log.answer: Require explicit search for v1 to avoid permission prompts; geolocation can be added in v2.

elicitation_log.question: What unit system should be used — metric, imperial, or user-selectable?
elicitation_log.answer: Assumed metric (°C, km/h) for v1 since the primary audience is EU-based; unit toggle deferred to backlog.

elicitation_log.question: How many days should the forecast strip show — 5 or 7?
elicitation_log.answer: Inferred 5-day from the original request wording; stakeholder confirmation pending.

elicitation_log.question: Should users be able to save multiple locations for quick switching?
elicitation_log.answer: Saved locations list is explicitly out of scope per product owner in kickoff meeting.

elicitation_log.question: Does the detail-cards grid need a pressure or visibility metric, or just temp/humidity/wind/UV?
elicitation_log.answer: Which additional metrics to surface in detail cards has not been confirmed; defaulting to humidity, wind, UV index, and pressure as the four cards.

acceptance_tests: Dashboard loads and shows current conditions
App navigates between dashboard and search
